CommunityApplications.Profile:
Templates for **pypiron** — a self-hosted PyPI server in a single binary, with no database.
One container hosts your private package uploads, mirrors an allowlist of public packages, proxies the rest of PyPI on demand, and serves it all from a standard simple index. The files on disk are the truth; the indexes are regenerable views, so backing it up is backing up one folder.
Speaks pip / uv / poetry / pdm / twine unchanged. Fail-closed against dependency confusion: private names never fall through to upstream.
Source, docs, and the full benchmark methodology: https://pypiron.com · https://github.com/blackthorn-interstellar/pypiron
Support: open an issue at https://github.com/blackthorn-interstellar/pypiron/issues
